_comment: Real-shape hook fixture corpus for tests/run_fixture_corpus.py (#117). Each case runs one hook under home/.claude/hooks/ against a committed fixture in the REAL Claude Code envelope shape and asserts its exit code (2 = block, 0 = allow). 'stdin' cases pipe a PreToolUse hook-input payload (pretooluse/*.json) straight to the hook. 'transcript' cases point the Stop hook at a transcript JSONL (transcripts/*.jsonl) via a synthesized Stop envelope. See README.md for how to regenerate/redact fixtures.

cases.desc: interpreter inline-code egress one-liner is blocked
gh api write in trailing argv position is blocked
a gh api read (GET) is allowed
block-egress ignores a non-Bash tool_name (real envelope)
generic subagent_type=claude with no model= is blocked
the same delegation under the historical tool_name 'Task' is also blocked — the gate must fire on either name (#138)
require-delegation ignores a non-Agent tool_name (real envelope)
claim over edited .py with no verification is blocked; also pins #80 (tool-result records skipped when finding the turn boundary)
a real pytest tool_use this turn counts as evidence — allowed
a claim over a docs-only (README.md) edit does not fire
a /verify reference in the turn counts as evidence — allowed
a /bet reference in the turn counts as evidence — allowed
a /run reference in the turn counts as evidence — allowed
a standalone /verify invocation turn edits no product code — allowed (see #109 in README for the tag-shape caveat)
